title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 23.280 - Sunset act not to prohibit certain activities of the general assembly
text:
23.280.  Sunset act not to prohibit certain activities of the general assembly. — Sections 23.250 to 23.298 shall not prohibit the general assembly from:
  (1)  Terminating a program at a date earlier than that provided in sections 23.250 to 23.298; or
  (2)  Considering any other legislation relative to a program subject to sections 23.250 to 23.298.
(L. 2003 S.B. 299 & 40)
